productDisplayName: Puma Men Heroes T7 Green Tshirt
description: Composition Green round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with white cuffs, white panels on the shoulders to the cuffs and graphic print of branding on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with luke warm water Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations Lightweight with a round neck, this T-shirt from puma is stylish, and yet relaxed. The graphic print tee gives you a stunning apperance. Perfect worn with jeans, this tee also works great with shorts and track pants.
